items.title: Kevin Love joins The Richard Show | NBA Finals 10-Year Reunion
items.author: Richard A. Jefferson
items.body_excerpt: Coming Sunday... Kevin Love sits down for our second NBA Finals 10-Year Reunion episode! We cover everything from his favorite thing to watch on YouTube (my highlights...no I'm not joking) to the memories that defined our 2016 finals run. A decade later, the stories are better…

items.title: Kevin Love: Kurt Rambis really pushed me to shoot more threes in my third year
items.author: HoopsHype

items.title: One more thing: A big thank you to Kevin Love, Jack Sikma, Al Horford and Brook Lopez for sharing their stories with me. Could almost write another column with the stuff I couldn't fit into this one.
items.author: John Hollinger
items.body_excerpt:

media.title: How NBA big men evolved from post players to shooters and playmakers beyond the paint (Gift Article)
media.description: In recent decades, big men have grown increasingly comfortable with scoring away from the hoop. Who were most vital to the evolution?
